hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "`$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File (Join-Path `$root '.codex/hooks/vault-git-commit-stop.ps1')"
hooks.commandWindows: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "`$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File (Join-Path `$root '.codex/hooks/vault-git-commit-stop.ps1')"
